name: gnomad-genetics-mcp-server
description: Look up variant allele frequencies by ancestry, gene loss-of-function constraint, gene variant lists, and sequencing coverage over gnomAD — with ClinVar significance joined in.

interface.shortDescription: Population allele frequencies, gene constraint, and variant catalogs over gnomAD for variant interpretation.
interface.longDescription: Human population genetics over the gnomAD GraphQL API. Fetch the full population record for a variant (allele count/number/frequency overall and per genetic-ancestry group, with joined ClinVar significance), assess gene loss-of-function constraint (pLI / LOEUF), list variants in a gene/transcript/region with allele frequencies, and check sequencing coverage to tell a true absent variant from an uncallable position. Large result sets stage on a DataCanvas for SQL. Keyless; a polite, rate-limited client.
